fontFamilies.name: Open Sans
fontFamilies.role: Primary sans-serif, body text and larger headings

fontFamilies.name: OpenSans
fontFamilies.role: System sans-serif, all heading levels H1-H6

fontFamilies.name: Montserrat
fontFamilies.role: Secondary/Display, hero text and long-form copy

observations.fontFamilyMixture: Primary sans-serif (Open Sans/OpenSans) for all text. Montserrat secondary for display/hero.
observations.fontSizeScale: Power-of-1.25 base scale from 9px to 50px. Consistent gaps support visual hierarchy.
observations.negativeTuning: Letter-spacing: negative values range from -0.25px to -1.33px, creating tight, modern look
observations.lineHeightPattern: Headings cluster around 1.17 ratio; body text uses 1.36-1.625 for comfortable reading
observations.designPattern: Soft UI Dashboard uses clean sans-serif typography with tight tracking for sophisticated feel
observations.iconFonts: FontAwesome5FreeRegular and FontAwesome5BrandsRegular at 14px, 18px, 20px sizes (not semantic tokens)

warnings: FontAwesome icon fonts (FontAwesome5FreeRegular, FontAwesome5BrandsRegular) present in Figma but not exported as tokens (icon usage should reference image assets)
Two variants of OpenSans: 'Open Sans' and 'OpenSans' (spacing difference) — both mapped to --font-family-primary/mono

duplicateHandling.example: Multiple OpenSans H1/H2/H3/H4/H5/H6 weight variants (400, 600, 700) deduplicated into weight presets
